01.name: Core Backend & API Gateway
scope: Expand Agent model: steps, tools, llm_config, rag_config, mcp_config, security_policy, graph_definition, input/output_schema
Wire execution engine: POST /agents/{id}/execute → LangGraph runtime with WebSocket streaming
Fix /api/v1/health alias (Settings page 404)
Fix audit_logs route: add auth, handle empty DB gracefully
Enforce API envelope format on all routes

current_state.agents.py: 140 lines — minimal CRUD, only name/description/tags in AgentCreate
current_state.executions.py: 101 lines — read-only stubs, no execution creation
current_state.audit_logs.py: 71 lines — bare list, no auth, fails on empty DB

acceptance_criteria: AgentCreate accepts 10+ fields (steps, tools, llm_config, rag_config, mcp_config, security_policy, graph_definition)
POST /agents/{id}/execute creates execution and streams via WebSocket
GET /api/v1/health returns {status:healthy}
GET /audit-logs/ returns {data:[], meta:{}} when empty (not 500)
All routes use require_auth dependency
1092+ tests pass

22.name: Master Validator
scope: Test suite: 1092+ tests, 0 failures
SDD check: 10/10
Branding: zero openairia references
Smoke tests: automated curl for all endpoints
Frontend build: no errors
UX audit: no JSON fields on standard forms, all buttons functional, all pages load
Cross-agent integration: create → execute → trace → audit flow
acceptance_criteria: 1092+ tests pass
All pages load without error
No JSON fields on standard forms
Create → Execute → Trace → Audit works end-to-end
All sidebar items navigate to functional pages

critical_path: 01 (Core Backend — expanded Agent model + execution engine + health fix + audit fix)
02 (Visual Builder — 20+ nodes, save/load, rich property panel)
08 (Model Router — Vault secrets for API keys, visual rule builder)

ux_principles.zero_json: No raw JSON fields on any standard form. Use visual builders, dropdowns, sliders, rich editors.
ux_principles.wizards_over_forms: Multi-step wizards with previews for complex creation flows (agents, templates, workflows).
ux_principles.visual_first: Drag-drop graph editors for agent and workflow composition. React Flow 12.
ux_principles.real_data: All dashboards must show actual data from APIs, not hardcoded zeros.
ux_principles.error_handling: Empty state = friendly guidance. Error state = actionable message. Never raw stack traces.
ux_principles.one_click: Templates instantiate in one click. Connectors onboard via OAuth buttons. Secrets rotate via button.

critical_gaps: Agent Create modal has only 3 fields — needs 7-step wizard
No execution engine — can't run agents
Model Router has no API key storage — can't use external LLMs
Connectors use raw JSON config — no type-specific forms
No MCP Apps frontend — feature invisible
NL Wizard has backend but zero frontend
ux_gaps: Templates page uses raw JSON Definition field
Workflow steps use raw JSON config
Router rules use raw JSON conditions
DLP detectors are plain tag input, not visual picker
Lifecycle uses raw Agent ID text input
Dashboard shows all zeros with no actionable guidance
data_gaps: Cost metrics empty — no token ledger
DLP metrics all 0 — no scans happening
SentinelScan posture always 100 — no real data
